privileged_info_summary: The MovieLens Latest Small dataset (ml-latest-small.zip) used in this task contains real user rating data from GroupLens Research at the University of Minnesota. The dataset includes exactly 9,742 movies, 100,836 ratings from 610 unique users, and 3,683 tag applications spanning March 29, 1996 to September 24, 2018. All metadata paths are correctly specified: the database will be created at /home/ga/Documents/databases/movielens.db; the DBeaver connection is named 'MovieLens'; and output files are directed to /home/ga/Documents/exports/ for CSV files and /home/ga/Documents/scripts/ for the SQL script. The download URL https://files.grouplens.org/datasets/movielens/ml-latest-small.zip is accurate and functional.
